hasAttributes.name: kbArticleId
hasAttributes.description: Shows the ID of the article.

hasAttributes.name: kbArticleTemplateId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the template that you want to use as a base for creating the new article.

hasAttributes.name: organizationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization associated with the article.

hasAttributes.name: subjectId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the subject of the article to assist with article searches. You can configure subjects under Business Management in the Settings area.

hasAttributes.name: articleXml
hasAttributes.description: Shows the article content and formatting, stored as XML.

hasAttributes.name: title
hasAttributes.description: Type a subject or descriptive name for the article to assist with article searches.

hasAttributes.name: number
hasAttributes.description: Knowledge base article number.

hasAttributes.name: content
hasAttributes.description: Description of the content of the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information that describes the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.name: comments
hasAttributes.description: Comments regarding the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the knowledge base article was created.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the knowledge base article was last modified.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether the knowledge base article is in draft, unapproved, or published status. Published articles are read-only and can't be edited unless they are unpublished.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Select the article's status.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Title of the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.name: keyWords
hasAttributes.description: Keywords to be used for searches in knowledge base articles.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the article.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the kbarticle.

hasAttributes.name: languageCode
hasAttributes.description: Select which language the article must be available in. This list is based on the list of language packs that are installed in your Microsoft Dynamics 365 environment.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: entityImageId
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

definitions.description: Structured content that is part of the knowledge base.
